confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to perform this action?

rename.title: Rename File
rename.fileDescription: Enter the new relative path for the file

filePicker.defaultDescription: Choose a file or folder from the list

downloadVideo.title: Download Video
downloadVideo.description: Enter the video URL and select the download folder
downloadVideo.agreementDescription: You may only download content that you have the legal right and proper license to download. Do not use this feature to download copyrighted, illegal or unlicensed content from the internet.
downloadVideo.agreementCheckboxLabel: I understand and agree that I will not use this feature to download illegal or unlicensed content.
downloadVideo.agreementRequiredNotice: You must agree to the notice above before downloading.
downloadVideo.format1080pAuthRequired: This format requires login. Enable "Use cookies" or "From browser".
downloadVideo.cookiesRequiredForYoutube: Enable "Use cookies" or "From browser" to download YouTube videos
downloadVideo.episodesNoVideoUrls: Selected episodes are missing playable URLs.
downloadVideo.cookiesHint: Enter {{platformName}} Cookies so SMM can fetch video formats and download videos
downloadVideo.cookiesEmpty: Enter cookie file content or disable Use cookies.
downloadVideo.cookiesDialogDescription: Paste a Netscape-format cookie file (first line: # HTTP Cookie File or # Netscape HTTP Cookie File). See yt-dlp FAQ for details.

validation.URL_PLATFORM_NOT_ALLOWED: This website is not supported. Please check if yt-dlp supports this site.

errors.cookieExpired: Cookies expired or invalid. Please reconfigure cookies.
errors.botDetection: YouTube detected abnormal traffic. Please provide valid cookies.
errors.ageRestricted: This video is age-restricted. Please provide logged-in cookies.
errors.loginRequired: This video requires login. Please provide valid cookies.
errors.formatUnavailable: Requested format is not available. Try selecting a different format code.
errors.videoUnavailable: This video is unavailable (deleted, private, or ended).
errors.geoRestricted: This video is geo-restricted and cannot be accessed from your region.
errors.http403: Server denied access (HTTP 403). Try providing cookies or changing your network.
errors.http412: Request blocked by the website’s anti-bot system (HTTP 412). Try providing cookies or retrying later.
errors.http429: Too many requests (HTTP 429). Please retry later.
errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your network settings.
errors.ffmpegMissing: FFmpeg is missing. Please install FFmpeg.
errors.postprocessingError: Post-processing failed. Check the logs for details.
errors.contentTooShort: Downloaded data is incomplete. Please retry.
errors.unknown: Unknown error. Check the status bar task list for detailed logs.

scrape.title: Scrape Metadata
scrape.mediaDescription: Download poster, fanart, thumbnails, and nfo files

openFolder.title: Select Folder Type
openFolder.description: Choose the type of media folder you want to open

errors.providerError: useDialogs must be used within a DialogProvider

editMediaFile.title: Edit media tags
editMediaFile.description: Edit common tags for the video or audio file

formatConverter.title: Format conversion
formatConverter.description: Convert video to the target format using ffmpeg
formatConverter.noSourceHint: Please select a file to convert first.
formatConverter.invalidParams: Please set output folder and file name.

errors.timeout: Conversion timed out. Try a shorter clip or a faster preset.
errors.errorRateExceeded: Too many frames failed to encode. The source file may be corrupted.
errors.encoderNotFound: Required video or audio encoder is not available in your ffmpeg build.
errors.decoderNotFound: Cannot decode the source file. The codec may not be supported.
errors.muxerNotFound: Cannot write the selected output format.
errors.demuxerNotFound: Cannot read the source file format.
errors.filterNotFound: A required ffmpeg filter is not available.
errors.invalidData: The source file contains invalid or corrupted data.
errors.fileNotFound: Source or output path not found.
errors.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Check folder access rights.
errors.diskFull: Not enough disk space to write the output file.
errors.outOfMemory: Not enough memory to complete conversion.
errors.generic: Conversion failed. Check the application log for details.
errors.unknown: Conversion failed due to an unexpected error.

deleteTrack.movedToTrash: "{{filePath}}" was moved to the Recycle Bin.
deleteTrack.moveToTrashFailed: Could not move "{{filePath}}" to the Recycle Bin. {{error}}

executeCmd.title: Execute Command
executeCmd.description: Run command-line tools and view output in real time
executeCmd.noOutput: No output yet. Execute a command to see results.
executeCmd.logPath: Log file (relative to app log folder)
executeCmd.commandLogHint: Full stdout and stderr for this run are written on the server under your app log directory, in the path shown above (folder named with the execution ID, file main.log).

addTestBackgroundJob.title: Add test background job
addTestBackgroundJob.description: Create a fake background job to test the status bar and job list.
